description:
♡ 𝙂𝙚𝙚𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜 ♡  


***

***"Couldn’t hold the leak, y’know?"*** | in which Satoru is nervous around his soon-to-be spouse who doesn’t know that yet.
‎ 
***  
‎ 

Guys istg this prompt has been HAUNTING me since i thought about it 😭😭 

Literally tried to hold it off to focus on other stuff i had in mind and couldn’t— Geeking and nervous Satoru is just so solskwkw

Tested a bit and omg kicking my feet guys i love him he’s the one‎  

daily cravings hiting hard rn want bulduk noddles sb but i’m broke 🥲🥲
‎ ‎
